<div id="container" class="recruit bg_top_illust">

	<!-- //// HEADER START //// -->

<header class="cmn_header">

  <div class="inner">

    <!-- PCメニュー -->
    <div class="hide_less_spc">

					</div>

					<div class="recruit_number">

						<div class="recruit_number_item">

							</div>
							<p class="recruit_number_additional">(2024年3月現在)</p>
						</div>

						<div class="recruit_number_item">
							<h3 class="recruit_number_head">売上高</h3>

							</div>
							<p class="recruit_number_additional">(2024年2月期)</p>
